subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-12 in London
subcodes.first_line: To the extent that all the Baha'is of the East are ready to give up their lives in their efforts to promote peace. Twenty thousand souls have sacrificed themselves
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدرجهئ‌یکه جمیع بهائیان شرق بجهت ترویج صلح جان میدهند بیست هزار نفر خود را فدای امر صلح
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @critique of Western values; culture
